profiles.activationRequires: Approved technical decision describing provider boundaries, human review, data handling, limits, cost, and fallback.
profiles.rollback: Disable the feature path and revert provider configuration without losing user-owned data.
naConditions: The approved scope contains no model-generated or model-interpreted behavior.
profiles.closureGate: All outputs are reviewable, provider failures are bounded, secrets stay server-side, and cost limits are evidenced.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved threat model or security decision for identity, authorization, sensitive operations, and compliance.
profiles.rollback: Disable the affected entry point, revoke introduced credentials, and restore the previous authorization policy.
naConditions: The approved change has no identity, authorization, sensitive data, or trust-boundary surface.
profiles.closureGate: Threats, negative authorization cases, secret handling, and recovery evidence are complete.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved technical profile that introduces a backend, API, worker, or externally callable contract.
profiles.rollback: Restore the prior contract or route traffic to the last known-good version.
naConditions: The approved change exposes no backend, worker, or API behavior.
profiles.closureGate: Contracts, failures, compatibility, and operational evidence are verified.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved data ownership, retention, migration, consistency, privacy, and recovery decision.
profiles.rollback: Stop writes when needed, restore from the tested recovery point, and run integrity verification.
naConditions: The approved change does not alter persisted data, schemas, migrations, replication, or synchronization.
profiles.closureGate: Integrity, interruption, rollback, ownership, and retention evidence are complete.

manualEvidence: Qualitative review for clarity and current ownership
negativeCases: Historical artifact treated as current policy
profiles.rollback: Restore the previous versioned documents and rerun link and findability checks.
naConditions: N/A is not allowed for the universal documentation profile.
profiles.closureGate: Critical documents are current, linked within two hops, neutral, and free of unresolved ownership drift.

negativeCases: MCP subtable misclassified as a server
profiles.rollback: Run hash-aware rollback for the explicit transaction or revert the constructor change.
naConditions: N/A is not allowed for the universal harness-tooling profile.
profiles.closureGate: Five harnesses match the capability matrix, the doctor has no unjustified FAIL, and a second run has no drift.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved environment, distribution, budget, availability, observability, and provider decision.
profiles.rollback: Return traffic and configuration to the last known-good release using the approved provider runbook.
naConditions: The approved change has no environment, deployment, distribution, availability, or observability impact.
profiles.closureGate: Cost, environment, health, observability, and rollback evidence are approved.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved compatibility, distribution, versioning, licensing, and migration policy for a library or CLI.
profiles.rollback: Reinstall the previous immutable artifact and migrate state only through a tested reverse path.
naConditions: The approved change does not expose a reusable library, package, plugin, generator, or CLI.
profiles.closureGate: Artifact, compatibility, licenses, migration, multi-platform behavior, and rollback are evidenced.

profiles.activationRequires: Approved user experience scope, accessibility target, ground truth, platforms, and visual evidence policy.
manualEvidence: Loading, empty, error, and constrained-connectivity states
profiles.rollback: Restore the previous interaction and visual contract while preserving user data.
naConditions: The approved change has no visible or interactive user interface.
profiles.closureGate: Functional, accessibility, state, ground-truth, and platform evidence are approved.

conditionalSignals.condition: Only after an approved React-based technical profile and a stable advisory baseline.
Only when a web user interface and visual evidence policy exist.
Only when it is an approved visual source of truth.
